chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.D-12 of 2023 Cr. Misc. Application No.D-16 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 13-12-2023 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant, no intimation received. Accordingly instant criminal miscellaneous applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
